title: Create pragmatic planning artifacts for the POC
summary: Add epic.json and issue-{n}.json files for the approved POC using a simple schema that is easy to extend.
acceptance_criteria: Three epic folders exist with epic.json and issue JSON files
The schema includes identifiers, scope, dependencies, acceptance criteria, and verification fields
verification: JSON parsing of all epic and issue artifacts
notes: The schema is intentionally lightweight and repo-local.
